testcase.name: isReady is false before the first DataStore emission is processed
setDarkMode(true) saves settings with isDarkMode = true
setLanguage preserves the current dark mode state
initial settings match the domain defaults: isDarkMode=false, language=ARABIC
isReady stays true after subsequent repository emissions
setDarkMode(false) saves settings with isDarkMode = false
setDarkMode preserves the current language selection
isReady becomes true after the first DataStore value is collected
setLanguage(ARABIC) saves settings with language = ARABIC
settings StateFlow emits updated values when the repository flow changes
setDarkMode delegates to saveSettingsUseCase exactly once
setLanguage(ENGLISH) saves settings with language = ENGLISH
setLanguage invokes AppCompatDelegate.setApplicationLocales with the correct tag
setLanguage delegates to saveSettingsUseCase exactly once
